text: Now let me synthesize everything before making my decision.

function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "investigate", "action_id": "ask_guard_radio", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": -0.5, "adjustment_reasons": ["Hand-set prior with n=0 — no observations behind it, weak starting point", "No precedents at this site for this event type — genuine novelty", "Guard no-shows are often benign (sick/traffic/schedule), and no corroborating alarm signals present"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.45, "what_would_change_my_mind": "If the on-site guards report the missing guard called in sick or has a known personal issue, I'd lower P(real) further and suppress. If they can't reach him and find his vehicle/equipment still on site or signs of disturbance, I'd raise P(real) and escalate.\""}
